extract: Golem (Japanese: ゴローニャ Golonya) is a dual-type Rock/Ground Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Graveler when traded or when exposed to a Linking Cord. It is the final form of Geodude. In Alola, Golem has a dual-type Rock/Electric regional form. It evolves from Alolan Graveler when traded. It is the final form of Alolan Geodude. These Golem can also be found in Blueberry Academy's Terarium. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)
